data.description:
# Live-store remediation: drive fsck to zero

## Why
The historical corruption RC1 caused is still resident: current `rebar fsck` = 2422
SNAPSHOT_INCONSISTENT + 11 ORPHAN_EVENT + 1 MISSING_CREATE. Fix #1 stopped new corruption; this
cleans up the backlog.

## What
Build a repair path that rebuilds each affected snapshot from the full ordered event log (including
`*.retired` from A1), reusing A2's rebuild machinery, then run it against the live store with the
20-min reconciler pass paused.

## Scope
Repair tooling (e.g. an `fsck --repair`-style rebuild in `src/rebar/_commands/fsck.py` /
`compact.py`) + a coordinated live run. Depends on A1 and A2. Gated on RC1 fix #1 deployed (done).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Repair path rebuilds snapshots from the full ordered log (reads `.retired`).
- [ ] Before/after fsck counts recorded; live store reaches 0 SNAPSHOT_INCONSISTENT / ORPHAN_EVENT / MISSING_CREATE.
- [ ] Orphan disposition policy applied: additive orphans (comment/tag/link) recovered; LWW-scalar orphans (folded siblings hard-deleted pre-A1) triaged by a human, decision recorded.
- [ ] Run coordinated with live writers (reconciler pass paused during remediation).
data.title: Live-store corruption remediation: drive fsck to zero
